title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. paucifoliatum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. paucifoliatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and terpenoid compounds. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Hawkweed is typically prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, and topical applications, although its efficacy and safety should be evaluated by a healthcare professional before consumption.
